name: Diamonds & Curls Salon
tagline: Downtown Santa Rosa’s full-service hair and beauty salon — cuts, color, extensions, and lashes from a team with 15+ years behind the chair.
seoDescription: Diamonds & Curls Salon is a downtown Santa Rosa hair and beauty salon at 603 4th St — cuts, color, hair and lash extensions, and waxing, with an A+ BBB rating and 15+ years of experience.

sections.heading: Color, cuts, and lashes that earn a standing appointment
sections.subheading: Diamonds & Curls has been a downtown Santa Rosa fixture since 2010 — a full-service salon where experienced stylists handle everything from a fresh cut to a full color transformation, extensions, and lashes, all under one roof.

sections.heading: Fifteen years of getting it right
body: Diamonds & Curls grew out of Strut Salon, building over more than fifteen years into the full-service downtown shop it is today — more services, better products, and the same focus on sending clients out feeling like themselves, only sharper.

It’s the kind of place clients recommend without hesitation: experts at cuts, color, and extensions, with an A+ BBB rating and a walk-in-welcome door right on Fourth Street. High-end products, fair pricing, and a team that listens.

items.title: Haircuts & Styling
items.description: Precision cuts and styling for every hair type and length.

items.title: Color Transformations
items.description: Full color, balayage, and corrections from stylists who specialize in it.

items.title: Hair Extensions
items.description: Quality extensions for length and volume, applied to last.

items.title: Lash Extensions
items.description: All styles of lash extensions, tailored to the look you want.

items.title: Facial Waxing
items.description: Clean, careful facial waxing as part of a full beauty visit.

items.title: High-End Products
items.description: A shelf of professional products to keep the look going at home.

items.title: A+ rated and trusted
items.body: An A+ Better Business Bureau rating, earned over years.

items.title: Truly full-service
items.body: Hair, color, extensions, lashes, and waxing in one visit.

items.title: 15+ years of skill
items.body: Experienced stylists who know how to deliver the result you pictured.

items.title: Right downtown
items.body: On Fourth Street in downtown Santa Rosa, walk-ins welcome.

sections.heading: Ready for a refresh?
sections.body: Visit Diamonds & Curls Salon at 603 4th St in downtown Santa Rosa. Call (707) 367-0056 to book.
